hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo 'Running pre-commit checks...'; bundle exec jekyll build --quiet 2>&1 && html5validator --root . --match '*.html' --blacklist _layouts _posts notes projects 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: Fix Jekyll build or HTML validation errors before committing.'; exit 2; }; fi
